calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Mar-14-2024 Off Calendar

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment
Off Calendar Feb-27-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances (via Zoom videoconference):
Atty. AMANDA RUSSO, Esq. of Goodwin Procter LLP (Tel: 213-426-2500) for Defendant Warrior Sports, INC.
No other appearances made in this matter.

Hearing Re: PLAINTIFF EMA BELL's Motion To Approve Proposition 65 Settlement And Consent Judgment.

Matter not argued/contested. The Court adopts its tentative ruling.

Plaintiff's unopposed motion to approve Proposition 65 settlement and consent judgment is granted.

Order signed. Consent Judgment signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer Jr.; Clerk: V. Da Fonseca; Not reported. (302/RBU)
